# Chapter 12: Multi-agent and game-theoretic systems  (~110 pp)
- 12.1 Game theory engineering-first (15) · 12.2 Nash equilibria, dominant strategies (15) · 12.3 Mechanism design and auctions (18) · 12.4 Coordination and consensus in multi-agent systems (15) · 12.5 Swarm intelligence and stigmergy: indirect coordination through environment (15) · 12.6 Coupled-agent failure modes (12) · 12.7 Failure section: races to the bottom, tragedies of the commons in engineered systems (20)

**Archetype**: balance, control, ethics. **Project**: simulate a market or auction; verify equilibrium properties. **Exercises**: 25.
